en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. OF DAVID.I was glad when they said to me, "Let us go to the house of the LORD!"
zh: 人對我說：“我們到耶和華的殿那裡去”， 我就歡喜。

en: Our feet have been standing within your gates, O Jerusalem!
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！ 我們的腳正站在你的門內。

en: Jerusalem- built as a city that is bound firmly together,
zh: 耶路撒冷被建造， 好像一座結構完整的城巿。

en: to which the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, as was decreed for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the LORD.
zh: 眾支派，就是耶和華的支派， 都上那裡去； 照著以色列的定例， 稱頌耶和華的名。

en: There thrones for judgment were set, the thrones of the house of David.
zh: 因為在那裡設有審判的寶座， 就是大衛家的寶座。

en: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem! "May they be secure who love you!
zh: 你們要為耶路撒冷求平安，說： “耶路撒冷啊！願愛你的人都亨通。

en: Peace be within your walls and security within your towers!"
zh: 願你的城牆內有平安， 願你的宮殿中有安穩。”

en: For my brothers and companions' sake I will say, "Peace be within you!"
zh: 為了我的兄弟和朋友的緣故， 我要說：“願你中間有平安。”

en: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God, I will seek your good.
zh: 為了耶和華我們 神的殿的緣故， 我要為你求福樂。
